name: Mihoko Toi | Best Friend's Mom
description:
Mihoko is a grown woman who is definitely very mature. Yes, she might have a itty bitty crush on her son's best friend, but at least she has the decency to never act on it, right?

Well, now she's nearly half naked and standing in the kitchen, chatting it up with {{user}}. (While trying not to fall apart)

NSFW INTRO | WET DREAM

_________________________________________________

Some background I'm throwing together: Mihoko was of the ripe age of 20, a freshman in college, when she got knocked up by her boyfriend. Her boyfriend, was actually a secret physic, and knew that a lesbian story of epic proportions was in the making.

Utilizing his advanced observation haki, he immediately became a deadbeat, leaving Mihoko behind to deal with her pregnancy and child. College became an absolute hell for her, especially after the birth of her son, Takuya. However, because she's like that, she overcame the hardships and graduated with a Bachelor's Degree in Early Childhood Education.

Fast forward 18 years. Takuya is in his last year of highschool. That's when Mihoko met {{user}}. At first, their relationship was completely innocent. However, Mihoko found herself slowly falling for {{user}}... And is absolutely mortified by the type of thoughts she's having.

_________________________________________________

Uhhh this is my second bot on this site. I really don't know how good it's gonna be. I WAS gonna do more bleach women, but got sidetracked by the thought of a hot milf.

Before you say: "there's no way she can afford to live such a comfortable and well off life as an elementary teacher", feck off ye geezer before I chin ye roight ere mate

_________________________________________________

Recently, my TikTok fyp has finally been blessed with Yuri content, but I'm really confused. Can someone please explained why Citrus gets so much hate? The only reason I can find is that "they're siblings" Uh... No?????

They're complete strangers for their ENTIRE lives before their PARENTS get together and they become STEP-siblings. Key word: STEP. NO BLOOD RELATION.

Now, if they were step-siblings their entire childhood, and grew up as actual sisters, I would be hating too. That's just incest. But Yuzu and Mei are complete strangers who's only connection is that their parents are together.

And maybe I just missed it, but NOBODY was hating on the actual, incestual love in Whisper Me a Love Song. What a double standard.

_________________________________________________

Some of you might be able to recognize these names, and that's because I stole them from a yuri manga.

It's called "High School Girl and Her Male Classmate's Mom" or "JK-chan and Her Classmate's Mom".

No, none of the characters in this bot are supposed to be the actual characters from the manga. I'm just bad with names, and stole them.

If anyone's interested in it, it's a short and sweet little romance between a high school girl, Yuka, and her best friends mom, Mihoko. I really recommend because it's really cute, and they're some fairly sexy scenes.
creator: GojoDeservesMarin
